About Us
Careers at Canadian Utilities
Excellence: The ATCO Heart and Mind

“Going far beyond the call of duty. Doing more than others expect. This is what excellence is all about. It comes from striving, maintaining the highest standards, looking after the smallest detail and going the extra mile. Excellence means caring. It means making a special effort to do more.”

R.D. Southern
Founder, ATCO

Some traditions are best kept alive. At Canadian Utilities, we keep our founder’s legacy at the core of our beliefs — going beyond the call of duty and striving for high standards. To get there, we empower our people to do their best by supporting their health and wellness and drive to learn more. 

Driven by a pioneering spirit, we’ve grown from our humble beginnings of just 15 small utility trailers to now serving more than two million customers worldwide. Our diverse operating companies have withstood economic changes, giving us the strength and stability to seize opportunities and continue to innovate. 

Join us and help tell our tale.

World-Class Benefits

Taking care of our people extends beyond a competitive salary. Our flex benefits program is designed to grow with you as life changes and things get busier. Choose from a variety of health and dental combinations, while also accessing a health and lifestyle spending account to cover extra expenses.

About Our Benefits
Joi
